summary: Accepted reimage1804_c02 as the aligned-NV branch from terminal strong-pi pODMR evidence, superseded the initial Ramsey/T2star scout because advisory exceeded the daytime tracking-window cap, verified and submitted a revised Ramsey/T2star scout, and recorded running status. Bridge job nv23_ramsey_20260514_201034_auto_ramsey is running at average 1/8 with healthy initial counts; no T2star or 13C conclusion yet.

next_action.details: Do not submit or mutate other bridge jobs while this Ramsey scout is queued/running. When terminal, export the savedexperiment raw data, review raw readouts and fitted-reference/pointwise normalization views, fit T2star only if a real Ramsey signal is visible, and FFT-check for 13C sidebands near det +/- 384 kHz without claiming 13C from isolated low-SNR peaks. If terminal failure before data, distinguish route/hardware/code failure from tracking/count freshness evidence.
